ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code representing the airline (e.g., AA for American Airlines) */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "airline_status" TEXT /* Current status of the airline (e.g., active, suspended, bankrupt) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline associated with this metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Passenger Count) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Group identifier for aggregating data */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., operational, financial, safety) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external, real-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating this route */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Code of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Code of the arrival airport */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the flight route in kilometers */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code representing the airport (e.g., BOS for Boston Logan) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the delay */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes delayed */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., weather, mechanical issues) */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay began */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival after the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES scheduled_flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_metrics" (
  "op_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational metric entry */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline associated with this metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the operational metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., operational, financial, safety) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external, real-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_metrics_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route for this flight */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of departure */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of departure */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Legacy Carriers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., legacy, low-cost, regional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)
